Request a refill

Brooke or Nicki typically reviews within 4 hours during clinic hours. We'll route directly to your usual pharmacy unless you tell us otherwise.

Request sent

Brooke has been notified. You'll see status updates here and in your provider chat. Most refills are approved within 4 hours.

Prescription history

Discontinued medications — kept for clinical context

  • Pregnenolone Mar 7, 2025 → Sep 7, 2025
    50mg · daily · Olympia Pharmacy
    Discontinued — no measurable benefit on cortisol panel
  • Testosterone Cypionate (injectable) Mar 11, 2025 → Jan 4, 2026
    200mg/mL · 0.5mL IM weekly · Empower Pharmacy
    Switched to pellet protocol — improved compliance
